---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new model, metric, or extension to the research
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like to add?**
(e.g. a new model, a new surname/name set, a new classification approach, a new visualization)

**Why is this useful?**
Explain how this extends or improves the bias analysis.

**Any relevant references**
Links to papers, datasets, or prior work that support this.
